name: Hi Venus
overview: Ye Shilan, a pediatrician at Taoyuan Village Clinic, starts off on the wrong foot with the new director Lu Zhaoxi due to a misunderstanding. By chance, she becomes his assistant. In solving many problems around running the place and patient treatment, the two fall in love. As they grow together, they come to have a deeper understanding for the mission of doctors to save lives and heal the wounded.

trailers.title: [ENG SUB] Hi Venus - Trailer | Starring: Joseph Zeng, Liang Jie | Romantic Comedy Drama
